message:
feat(python): numpy.linalg.eigvalsh wrapper parity (franken_numpy-2k5n)

Add fnp_python.eigvalsh(a, UPLO='L') as a passthrough delegator
to np.linalg.eigvalsh so the UPLO selector, complex-Hermitian
eigenvalue realness guarantee, and batched (..., M, M) broadcasting
semantics match numpy exactly.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with five scenarios: real 2x2
symmetric with default UPLO='L', explicit UPLO='U' on a 3x3
symmetric, 4x4 identity (eigenvalues all 1), batched stack of two
2x2 symmetric matrices, and a complex128 Hermitian 2x2.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
